description: Deploys (or reuses) an Azure OpenAI PAYG account + model deployment used by SecurityInsight for AI summary generation. Customer values (SubscriptionId, ResourceGroupName, Location, AccountName, DeploymentName) are set via launcher.override.ps1 (sibling, .gitignore'd) or edited directly in the launcher template.
author: Morten Knudsen <mok@mortenknudsen.net>
notes: Single launcher for the Deploy_OpenAI engine. Edit launcher.override.ps1 (sibling) to swap any value at runtime without modifying the template.
